title: The Fatal Accidents Act, 1855
full_text: The Fatal Accidents Act, 1855 घातक दुर्घटना अधिनियम,1855 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 185513 Act Number: 13 Enactment Date: 1855-03-27 Act Year: 1855 Short Title: The Fatal Accidents Act, 1855 Hindi Title: घातक दुर्घटना अधिनियम,1855 Long Title: An Act to provide compensation to families for loss occasioned by the death of a person caused by actionable wrong Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 27-03-1855 Last Updated: 25-03-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Fatal Accidents Act, 1855 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 1A. Suit for compensation to the family of a person for loss occasioned to it by his death by actionable wrong. Section 2. Not more than one suit to be brought. Section 3. Plaintiff shall deliver particulars, etc. Section 4. Interpretation-clause.
